capabilities: Health-aware job orchestration across four compute nodes
Adaptive routing based on observed node performance
Autonomous task generation with approval gates for risky operations
Shared Markdown memory corpus with local semantic indexing per node
Nightly automated knowledge curation and archival

Self-healing runtime watchdog with automated incident response
File-based durable job queue with retry and timeout handling
ZFS snapshot-backed storage with 15-minute, daily, and weekly retention
